# M2 — vocabulary coverage (generated by `showcase-batch`; do not hand-edit)

Corpus: the 26 showcased spells (6 seeds + 20 fusions). Every verb, delivery, element, status, and band value occurring in the corpus, with the spells that exhibit it. Band families are reflected from `BalanceTables`.
